name: Westwater Resources, Inc.
description: Westwater Resources, Inc. is an energy technology and critical minerals company focused on developing battery-grade natural graphite essential for advanced energy storage and electric vehicle markets. Headquartered in Centennial, Colorado, the company is dedicated to the exploration and development of US-based mineral resources. While historically involved in uranium operations, Westwater Resources has shifted its strategic focus toward the production of Coated Spherical Purified Graphite (CSPG), aiming to provide high-purity materials that support energy density, efficiency, and cycle life for the rapidly growing clean energy and battery technology sectors.
